title: Harden Python CoAP transport boundaries
description: Recovery audit found invalid unbracketed IPv6 URI construction, malformed authority exceptions, ignored nondefault ports, incorrect local endpoint identity, and duplicate receiver registration/unregister ownership corruption in python/src/lichen/coap/transport.py. Fix with focused lifecycle and URI tests.
close_reason: Python CoAP endpoint, port, ownership, persistence, and teardown boundaries are hardened end to end.
